message:
fix(cli,sqlite): add confidence range validation and PRAGMA safety assertion

cli.rs: Add parse_confidence validator for --suggest-confidence and
--min-confidence flags. Values outside 0.0-1.0 are now rejected at
parse time instead of silently producing nonsensical results.

export_sqlite.rs: Add debug_assert on PRAGMA helper functions to
validate that pragma_name contains only alphanumeric/underscore
characters, preventing potential SQL injection in debug builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
